metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5141
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 1, 3: cultured hippocampal and cortical neurons were stained for PIAS1, synaptophysin (SYP) and PSD95 (DLG4) and imaged using both confocal and SIM super-resolution microscopy. PIAS1 was omnipresent at e.g. nucleus and cytoplasm, but also showed partial co-localization with pre- and post-synaptic marker proteins.. Experimental description: M&M: "For the preparation of primary hippocampal and cortical neurons we employed the protocol previously described by Colnaghi et al.26 Dissected hippocampi and cortexes from two-day-old CD1 mice were incubated ..."

antibody:
PIAS1 24.6 μg/mL (D33A7 XP; Cell Signaling, Danvers, MA, USA)
